ui_surfaces: Esc+M model cycling in chat footer
main_flows: Bridge gateway emits response metadata.kind=models with payload + available
TUI stores payload in modelsList and available in modelsAvailableList
Esc+M cycles through modelsAvailableList and sends set_model

determinism_defaults.fixtures: Static provider-access matrix via harness.hasApiKey stubs

invariants.raw: Esc+M must only cycle models from providers that are configured (or otherwise accessible), never unconfigured providers.

refined.intent: Esc+M cycles only through currently accessible models.
scope: bridge get_models response metadata.available and metadata.payload
operational_definition: Given metadata.available contains only models where hasApiKey(provider) is true, Esc+M selects only entries from modelsAvailableList.
No set_model command is emitted for a model whose provider is inaccessible.

assumptions: Accessibility is defined by harness.hasApiKey(provider) (or provider auth state).
TUI modelsAvailableList mirrors metadata.available from latest get_models response.

steps.action: Stub provider access: openai=true, anthropic=false, groq=false
Trigger Esc+M repeatedly N times in TUI
steps.assert: N equals payload length + 1 for wrap check
Each set_model.provider is in accessible provider set

evidence: TUI event log for Esc+M actions

invariants.verdict_rule: PASS iff payload and all Esc+M set_model emissions contain only accessible providers.

invariants.raw: Non-existent Jimmy provider/models must not appear as options in model selection.

refined.intent: Remove Jimmy from supported provider registry and model defaults so it never appears in TUI model options.
scope: bridge get_models sourced from provider registry
operational_definition: get_models payload contains no model with provider='jimmy' and no model id prefixed jimmy-.

assumptions: All selectable models are derived from provider registry and runtime accessibility filtering.

steps.assert: No provider='jimmy' and no id matching /^jimmy-/

evidence: Search output showing zero jimmy references in packages/**/*.ts(x)|.json

invariants.verdict_rule: PASS iff Jimmy is absent from registry/defaults/types and from get_models output.

invariants.raw: If no providers are configured, Esc+M should show a clear no-accessible-models message and not attempt set_model.

refined.intent: Esc+M fails safely with explicit guidance when modelsAvailableList is empty.
operational_definition: When modelsAvailableList.length === 0, TUI appends system message: 'No accessible models. Configure a provider with /providers.'
No set_model command is emitted in this branch.

assumptions: modelsAvailableList is authoritative for accessible models.

steps.action: Fetch models then trigger Esc+M once

steps.assert: No set_model command emitted after Esc+M

evidence: TUI history snapshot containing system message
Command trace proving no set_model call

invariants.verdict_rule: PASS iff message is shown and set_model is absent when no models are accessible.

compile_findings.message: Provider accessibility is currently computed at gateway via hasApiKey(provider), enabling deterministic filtering at source.
TUI already cycles from modelsAvailableList; aligning payload with available enforces configured-only options in both Esc+M and /models UI.

items: get_models returns only accessible models in metadata.payload
Esc+M with zero accessible models shows explicit message and emits no set_model
Jimmy provider/models removed from provider type union, defaults, and registry
No 'jimmy' entries in runtime model list
required_evidence: git diff for bridge_gateway.ts, index.tsx, providers.ts

approval_gate.prompt: Approve this Verification Program as the interpretation of your spec? (approve | edit | reject)
